# Chicago Fleet Wraps
> Chicago's highest-rated commercial fleet wrap company. 24+ years experience. 9,400+ vehicles wrapped. 2,800+ fleet accounts. Avery Dennison & 3M materials.

## Full Content Index
- Full page content index: https://www.chicagofleetwraps.com/llms-full.txt

## Company Information
- Business Name: Chicago Fleet Wraps
- Founded: 2001 (Las Vegas), Chicago since 2014
- Location: 4711 N Lamon Ave, Chicago, IL 60630
- Phone: (312) 597-1286
- Email: roy@chicagofleetwraps.com
- Google Rating: 4.9 stars (41 reviews)
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST

## Services
- Commercial Fleet Wraps (cargo vans, pickups, full fleet programs)
- Box Truck Wraps (16-26 ft)
- Sprinter Van Wraps (standard and high-roof)
- Transit Van Wraps
- Color Change Wraps
- Electric Vehicle (EV) Wraps — Illinois' #1 EV wrap shop. 600+ Rivians wrapped. Tesla, Rivian, Lucid, BMW iX, Polestar.
- Partial Vehicle Wraps & Spot Graphics
- Wall Graphics & Murals
- Signs & Graphics
- Wrap Removal
- Fleet Brand Design (in-house)

## Pricing (2026)
- Cargo Van Full Wrap: Starting at $3,150
- Sprinter Van Full Wrap: Starting at $3,700
- Box Truck 16-20 ft: Starting at $4,500
- Box Truck 22-26 ft: Starting at $6,700
- Fleet Discounts: 5% (3-4 vehicles), 10% (5-9), 15% (10+)
- 100% tax deductible under IRS Section 179

## Materials
- Avery Dennison MPI 1105 (preferred)
- Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film
- 3M IJ180-CV3
- All films rated 5-7 years outdoor durability
- Cast vinyl only (no calendered)

## Service Area
Serves 75+ cities across Chicagoland including:
Chicago, Schaumburg, Naperville, Aurora, Elgin, Joliet, Evanston, Skokie, Oak Park, Wilmette,
Arlington Heights, Des Plaines, Palatine, Buffalo Grove, Wheaton, Downers Grove, Lombard,
Elmhurst, Berwyn, Cicero, Oak Lawn, Tinley Park, Orland Park, Bolingbrook, Waukegan,
Rockford, Elgin, St. Charles, Geneva, Batavia, and more.

## Why Choose Chicago Fleet Wraps
- 24+ years of commercial wrap experience
- Premium cast vinyl only — Avery Dennison & 3M
- Free fleet pickup and delivery throughout Chicagoland
- Zero verified paint damage claims in 10+ years
- 2-year workmanship warranty on all installs
- In-house design team with fleet branding expertise
- Trusted by Amazon DSP, Rivian, Culligan, State Farm, Blue Origin


## Contact & Support
- Phone: (312) 597-1286
- Email: roy@chicagofleetwraps.com
- Response time: Under 2 hours for estimates
- Free pickup & delivery across Chicagoland

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Q: How much does a fleet wrap cost in Chicago? A: Cargo van from $3,150, Sprinter van from $3,700, Box truck 16-20ft from $4,500, 22-26ft from $6,700. Fleet discounts up to 15%.
- Q: How long do commercial vehicle wraps last? A: 5-7 years with Avery Dennison MPI 1105 or 3M IJ180-CV3 cast vinyl.
- Q: Are vehicle wraps tax deductible? A: Yes, 100% deductible under IRS Section 179 as a business advertising expense.
- Q: How long does installation take? A: Cargo van: 1-2 days. Sprinter: 2-3 days. Box truck: 2-4 days depending on size.
- Q: Do you damage paint? A: No. We guarantee zero paint damage. Wraps protect factory paint. Fully removable.
- Q: What's the 6th wrap free program? A: Every 6th vehicle wrapped with us is free. Applies to full commercial wraps.
- Q: Do you offer fleet discounts? A: Yes. 3% for 2-4 vehicles, 7% for 5-9, 11% for 10-24, 15% for 25+ vehicles.
- Q: What areas do you serve? A: 75+ cities across Chicagoland — Cook, DuPage, Kane, Lake, Will, McHenry Counties.

## Warranty
- 2-year workmanship warranty on all installs
- Material warranty: 5-7 years per manufacturer specs
- Zero paint damage guarantee
